## CrowdStrike named a lead AI software pick for growth-focused investors

Qualitative endorsement in buy-side-facing media reinforces CRWD's perceived positioning as an AI-native security beneficiary — consistent with the existing thesis, though no new fundamental catalyst is introduced.

- CRWD is highlighted at the top of a three-stock list of AI software picks for growth investors
- Coverage frames CrowdStrike at the intersection of cybersecurity and AI vertical applications
- Medium classifier confidence; listicle format limits depth of analytical support
- No price target, catalyst, or financial metric cited in headline
